title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded. The incident occurred Monday morning.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities, raising concerns about public safety.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host the 2026 Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science and engineering, fostering economic development in the region.

title: Suspect Arrested in Stabbing of Pregnant Woman in Charlotte
summary: Police have arrested a woman with an extensive criminal background for stabbing a pregnant woman in a random, unprovoked attack in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about violent crime and the safety of vulnerable populations in public spaces, impacting community well-being.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the need for effective crime prevention strategies and rehabilitation programs to address repeat offenses.

title: 2028 Football Recruit Braylon Clark Visits Tennessee
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day (NC) wide-out Braylon Clark details his 'great' visit with Tennessee Football in Knoxville.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local talent and the recruitment process in college sports, highlighting opportunities for young athletes.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Advice on selecting a deck builder in Charlotte to enhance living space, outdoor enjoyment, and property value through successful deck construction.
charlotte_impact: Provides valuable information for homeowners looking to improve their properties, contributing to local economic activity.

title: Students Design Brand for Brown Museum in Guilford County NC
summary: Students are designing a brand for Charlotte Hawkins Brown's Canary Cottage, which is 100 years old.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the preservation of local history and the involvement of students in community projects, promoting cultural awareness.

title: Wastewater Spill Reaches Sugar Creek in West Charlotte
summary: A wastewater spill has reached Sugar Creek in west Charlotte. The overflow was first reported along Scott Futrell Drive on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about environmental pollution and the impact on local waterways, necessitating prompt remediation efforts.

title: Teenager Arrested in Deadly Shooting at Concord Park
summary: A teenager has been arrested in connection with a deadly shooting that occurred in the parking lot area of Hartsell Park in Concord.
charlotte_impact: Underscores the issue of youth violence and the need for community interventions to address crime in public spaces.

title: Lenoir Man Killed in Overnight Collision
summary: A Lenoir man was killed in an overnight collision. Speed and impairment were factors in the crash, according to the North Carolina State Highway Patrol.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of impaired driving and the importance of road safety measures to prevent fatal accidents.

title: Volunteer Firefighter Dies Battling Wildfire in Florida
summary: A volunteer firefighter died while battling a wildfire in Florida during brushfire suppression operations.
charlotte_impact: Recognizes the sacrifices made by firefighters and the risks they face while protecting communities from wildfires.

title: Scattered Showers & Warm for Saturday
summary: A cold front will bring scattered showers and an isolated thunderstorm today.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast, informing residents about potential weather conditions and allowing them to plan accordingly.

title: Lawmakers Investigate Deadly Child Abuse Case in Charlotte
summary: North Carolina lawmakers are investigating the deadly case of child abuse in Charlotte involving Dominque Moody, who was allegedly starved and beaten.
charlotte_impact: Raises serious concerns about child welfare and the need for improved systems to protect vulnerable children from abuse and neglect.

title: Kannapolis Firefighters Distribute Water Amid E. coli Boil Advisory
summary: Kannapolis firefighters are handing out cases of water after E. coli contamination prompted a boil water advisory for all of Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a public health crisis and the community's response to ensure access to safe drinking water during contamination.

title: Suspect Arrested in West Charlotte Arson
summary: Charlotte Fire responded to a heavy blaze on Tuckaseegee Road on Friday morning, and a suspect has been arrested for arson.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of arson and the importance of fire safety measures to protect property and lives.
